rulings.Case Title: LEONILA MORTENSEN, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Deft Union Pacific Railroad Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition, And To Extend The Close Of Discovery With Respect To Union Pacific Railroad Company
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 10, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Union Pacific Railroad Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition, and to extend close of discovery with respect to Union Pacific Railroad Co. is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
